name: Arc
description: Arc is a Chromium-based web browser by The Browser Company featuring a sidebar-first interface with Spaces, Boosts, and built-in AI tools.

years.notes: Official icon mark as publicly launched July 2023. Stylized letter-A symbol with coral-red arc and blue swoosh. Source viewBox 0 0 82 68, fitted to 24x24 via translate(0 2.0488) scale(0.2927).
